steps.t: Aragorn's camp can be found far to the north of Henneth Annûn on the southern border of Dagorlad. Anborn has asked you to rejoin Aragorn and the Host …
Mithrandir and Damrod can be found within Aragorn's encampment on the border of Dagorlad. You have arrived at Aragorn's encampment and should now spea…
Aragorn can be found in his encampment on the border of Dagorlad. You have spoken to Damrod and Mithrandir and should now speak to Aragorn.
